Smoke.description: Smoking status (smoker '+' or non-smoker '-'), used as the exposure variable in the case-control study.

Cases.description: Number of lung cancer cases by smoking status. 647 of 649 cases were smokers, 2 were non-smokers.

Controls.description: Number of non-cases (controls) by smoking status. 622 of 649 controls were smokers, 27 were non-smokers.
